summary.key_theme: 公司因監管需求出售 50 億美元資產導致股價波動，加上分析師下調目標價與市場對過度樂觀情緒的修正，短期面臨賣壓。

bullish.title: Analysts Rally Behind These Nuclear Leaders As White House Unveils Expansion Blitz
bullish.reason: 白宮推動核能擴張政策，分析師看好 Constellation Energy 作為核能供應商的長期成長潛力。

bullish.title: Constellation Energy Corporation (CEG) Chosen as Preferred Energy Source of New Nissan Stadium and the Tennessee Titans
bullish.reason: 獲得大型體育場館的能源供應合約，顯示公司在綠色能源市場的品牌影響力與業務拓展能力。

bullish.title: Constellation Energy Corp. stock rises Monday, outperforms market
bullish.reason: 股價表現優於大盤，反映市場對其核能資產組合的正面情緒。

bullish.title: Is Trending Stock Constellation Energy Corporation (CEG) a Buy Now?
bullish.reason: 受到投資人高度關注，市場對其作為核能領導者的投資價值進行正面評估。

bullish.title: Better Utility Stock: Constellation Energy vs. NextEra Energy
bullish.reason: 資料中心電力需求激增，使公司在公用事業類股中具備相對競爭優勢。

bearish.title: Constellation Energy (CEG) Falls 10.9% as JPMorgan Price Cuts Price Target
bearish.reason: 摩根大通下調目標價，引發市場對估值過高的擔憂，導致股價單日重挫 10.9 %。

bearish.title: Constellation Energy To Sell PJM Portfolio Of Generation Assets In $5 Billion Deal
bearish.reason: 公司為滿足監管要求出售 4.4 GW 天然氣發電資產，雖換取 50 億美元現金，但短期資產規模縮減引發市場不確定性。

bearish.title: Constellation Energy: Risk Of Disappointment On March 31, Retain Sell
bearish.reason: 缺乏 2026 年財測指引，且過度依賴 3 月 31 日的更新，分析師給予賣出評級。

bearish.title: Constellation Energy (CEG) Stock Higher After Jim Cramer Warned About Excess Optimism
bearish.reason: Jim Cramer 警告市場對該股存在過度樂觀情緒，提醒投資人注意回調風險。

bearish.title: CEG Stock Underperforms Industry in the Past Week: How to Play?
bearish.reason: 化學洩漏事件影響短期股價表現，導致該週表現落後於同業。

neutral.title: Constellation Energy Vote Tests Investor Expectations On DEI And Governance
neutral.reason: 面臨股東關於多元化、公平與包容性 (DEI) 的提案，屬於常規治理議題，對股價影響有限。

neutral.title: Stock Market Today: S&P 500, Dow Jones Futures Slip As Jobless Claims Fall To 205,000
neutral.reason: 整體大盤波動，Constellation Energy 被列為市場焦點，但主要受宏觀經濟數據影響。

neutral.title: A Look At Constellation Energy’s Valuation After Strong 1 Year Returns And Recent Pullback
neutral.reason: 針對過去一年強勁表現後的估值回調進行分析，屬中性市場觀察。
